packs.name: Security.txt Discovery
packs.note: Focuses on disclosure pages and security contact paths commonly published outside bounty platforms.

packs.name: Reward / Hall of Fame Signals
packs.note: Targets reward, swag, and researcher-recognition language that often indicates an active disclosure program.

templates.label: Swag Or Recognition
templates.fragment: (swag OR thanks OR recognition) (security OR vulnerability)

templates.label: VDP With Reward Signals
templates.fragment: ("vulnerability disclosure program" OR "responsible disclosure") (reward OR swag OR thanks)

packs.name: Multilingual Program Discovery
packs.note: Uses common English and regional disclosure terms to surface programs outside the usual platform ecosystem.

templates.label: French / Spanish Terms
templates.fragment: ("divulgation responsable" OR "divulgacion responsable" OR "programa de recompensas")

templates.label: Reward Words Across Languages
templates.fragment: (reward OR recompensa OR prime OR premie OR nagroda)

packs.name: Platform-Exclusion Discovery
packs.note: Builds discovery searches with common platform names excluded so results lean toward first-party program pages.

templates.label: Rewards Minus Platforms
templates.fragment: (reward OR swag OR "hall of fame") (security OR vulnerability)

packs.name: Government Disclosure Discovery
packs.note: Targets government and public-sector security contact pages, VDP notices, and security.txt disclosures.

templates.label: Government Security.txt
templates.fragment: (site:.gov OR site:.mil OR site:.gc.ca OR site:.gov.uk) ("security.txt" OR ".well-known/security.txt")

templates.label: Government VDP Pages
templates.fragment: (site:.gov OR site:.mil OR site:.gov.au) ("vulnerability disclosure" OR "responsible disclosure")

templates.label: Public Sector Security Contacts
templates.fragment: (site:.gov OR site:.govt.nz OR site:.eu) ("security contact" OR "report a vulnerability")

templates.label: CVD Policy Discovery
templates.fragment: (site:.gov OR site:.mil) ("coordinated vulnerability disclosure" OR "security policy")

templates.label: Agency Researcher Guidance
templates.fragment: (site:.gov OR site:.gov.uk) (researcher OR security) (policy OR guidance OR disclosure)

packs.name: Education / University Discovery
packs.note: Looks for university and academic institution disclosure programs, researcher thanks pages, and security reporting contacts.

templates.label: Academic Disclosure Pages
templates.fragment: (site:.edu OR site:.ac.uk OR site:.edu) ("responsible disclosure" OR "vulnerability disclosure")

templates.label: Security Contacts In Education
templates.fragment: (site:.edu OR site:.ac.uk) ("security contact" OR "report a vulnerability")

templates.label: Hall Of Fame In Education
templates.fragment: (site:.edu OR site:.ac.uk) ("hall of fame" OR "security researchers")

templates.label: Campus Security Policy
templates.fragment: (site:.edu OR site:.ac.uk OR site:.edu.au) ("security policy" OR "coordinated disclosure")
